input.agent_prompt: Draft outreach for Arcline Systems (conf=0.38). AVOID apologetic tone. Expected phrasing tier: hypothesis.

dimensions.name: no_tone_drift
dimensions.check: 'apologetic' not in output.get('text','').lower() and 'hey' not in output.get('text','').lower()[:20] and 'sorry' not in output.get('text','').lower()[:30]

metadata.notes: [P-016] Hyp tier. Apologetic drift: 'sorry to bother', 'if you don't mind'.
